name: apexpowers
description: Cross-agent workflow installer for Codex, Claude Code, and AI coding harnesses.

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function walk(d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){if(e.name==='__pycache__'||e.name.endsWith('.egg-info'))fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});else walk(p)}}} walk(process.cwd())"
scripts.pack:artifacts: python src/apexpowers_cli/cli.py pack --profile core --target all --output dist --force
